steps.title: Write both relationships
steps.content:
Translate each percentage statement into an equation.
$$a=2.60b$$
$$a=0.75c$$

steps.title: Solve for c in terms of b
steps.content:
Both expressions equal $a$, so set them equal and isolate $c$.
$$2.60b=0.75c$$
$$c=\frac{2.60}{0.75}b$$
$$c=\frac{52}{15}b$$

steps.title: Convert to a percent
steps.content:
The coefficient tells what percent of $b$ equals $c$. Multiply by $100\%$.
$$\frac{52}{15}\cdot 100\%=346.667\%$$
The closest listed value of $p$ is $347$. The answer is D.
